Fields.Name: Texture ID
Fields.Description: Texture ID

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Damipoly ID of decal generation standard. If specified by TAE, it will be the value of TAE.

Fields.Name: Reference Angle Offset Pitch
Fields.Description: Reference angle offset_up / down [deg]

Fields.Name: Reference Angle Offset Yaw
Fields.Description: Reference angle offset_left / right [deg]

Fields.Name: Paste Start Distance
Fields.Description: Pasting start distance [m]

Fields.Name: Paste End Distance
Fields.Description: Paste end distance [m]

Fields.Name: Start Distance Size
Fields.Description: Size at the start distance

Fields.Name: End Distance Size
Fields.Description: Size at the end distance [m]

Fields.Name: Mask SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Monitoring special effect ID. If you enter an arbitrary special effect ID, decals will not be generated unless the special effect is applied.

Fields.Name: Texture Replacement by Material
Fields.Description: When it is generated by an attack hit, 1 changes the texture depending on the defense material. New Texture ID = Blood Material ID * 10000000 + Original Texture ID

Fields.Name: Dummy Poly Search Location
Fields.Description: Damipoli Search Location 0 Body 1 Left Hand Weapon 2 Right Hand Weapon

Fields.Name: Use Deferred Decal
Fields.Description: Acts as a deferred decal at 1

Fields.Name: Use Paint Decal
Fields.Description: Acts as a paint decal at 1

Fields.Name: Blood Type Enable
Fields.Description: Affected by optional bloody expression, ID is +1000 in mild, do not paste if hidden

Fields.Name: Use Normal Component
Fields.Description: 1 if normal component is used (compatible with normal and shinyness texture integration)

Fields.Name: Enable POM
Fields.Description: Whether to enable POM

Fields.Name: Enable Emissive
Fields.Description: Whether to update emissive

Fields.Name: Enable Vertical Paste
Fields.Description: Whether to paste vertically

Fields.Name: Random Scale % - Min
Fields.Description: Random scale minimum [%]

Fields.Name: Random Scale % - Max
Fields.Description: Random scale maximum [%]

Fields.Name: Random Angle Roll - Min
Fields.Description: Random angle_minimum twist [deg]

Fields.Name: Random Angle Roll - Max
Fields.Description: Random angle _ maximum twist [deg]

Fields.Name: Random Angle Pitch - Min
Fields.Description: Random angle_minimum top and bottom [deg]

Fields.Name: Random Angle Pitch - Max
Fields.Description: Random angle_maximum value [deg]

Fields.Name: Random Angle Yaw - Min
Fields.Description: Random angle_minimum left and right [deg]

Fields.Name: Random Angle Yaw - Max
Fields.Description: Random angle_maximum left and right [deg]

Fields.Name: POM Height Scale
Fields.Description: POM height scale

Fields.Name: POM Sample - Minimum Count
Fields.Description: Minimum number of POM samples

Fields.Name: POM Sample - Maximum Count
Fields.Description: Maximum number of POM samples

Fields.Name: Blend Mode
Fields.Description: Blend mode

Fields.Name: Appearance Direction Type
Fields.Description: Reference coordinates that determine the direction in which the decal is flown

Fields.Name: Emissive Value Start
Fields.Description: Emissive starting price

Fields.Name: Emissive Value End
Fields.Description: Emissive end value

Fields.Name: Emissive Update Time
Fields.Description: Interpolation time from start value to end value

Fields.Name: Enable Interpolation
Fields.Description: Do you generate the time when the bar is extended due to the decal generation of TAE?

Fields.Name: Interpolation Interval Distance
Fields.Description: Distance to interpolate decals generated between TAE bars when interpolation is enabled

Fields.Name: Interpolation Start - Texture ID
Fields.Description: Texture ID at the start of interpolation (-1 uses the same value as the texture ID)

Fields.Name: Interpolation End - Texture ID
Fields.Description: Texture at the end of interpolation Texture ID (-1 uses the same value as the texture ID)

Fields.Name: Appearance SFX ID
Fields.Description: SFXID issued when the decal is affixed (Nothing is issued with -1)

Fields.Name: Appearance SFX Offset Position
Fields.Description: Offset distance of SFX generation position

Fields.Name: Mask Texture ID
Fields.Description: Mask texture ID (see texture ID with -1)

Fields.Name: Diffuse Texture ID
Fields.Description: Albedo Texture ID (See Texture ID with -1)

Fields.Name: Reflect Texture ID
Fields.Description: Reflectance texture ID (see texture ID with -1)

Fields.Name: Mask Strength Scale
Fields.Description: Mask strength (currently valid only with deferred decals)

Fields.Name: Normal Texture ID
Fields.Description: Normal texture ID (see texture ID with -1)

Fields.Name: Height Texture ID
Fields.Description: Height texture ID (see texture ID with -1)

Fields.Name: Emissive Texture ID
Fields.Description: Emissive Texture ID (See Texture ID with -1)

Fields.Name: Diffuse Color R
Fields.Description: Albedo color R

Fields.Name: Diffuse Color G
Fields.Description: Albedo color G

Fields.Name: Diffuse Color B
Fields.Description: Albedo color B

Fields.Name: Reflection Color R
Fields.Description: Reflect color R

Fields.Name: Reflection Color G
Fields.Description: Reflect color G

Fields.Name: Reflection Color B
Fields.Description: Reflect color B

Fields.Name: Life Enable
Fields.Description: Is the life effective?

Fields.Name: Shininess Scale
Fields.Description: The strength of shinyness

Fields.Name: Decal Duration
Fields.Description: Lifespan [seconds] (Time after decal is applied, fade-in time does not matter)

Fields.Name: Decal Fadeout Time
Fields.Description: Fade out time [seconds]

Fields.Name: Decal Priority
Fields.Description: The larger this value, the easier it is to remain (-1 does not disappear)

Fields.Name: Thin Out Nearby Decal
Fields.Description: Whether to thin out if there is a decal nearby

Fields.Name: Enable Aligned Texture Random Variation
Fields.Description: If you select Yes, one variation number randomly determined for each texture other than 0 will be applied. The number of non-zero variations must be the same.

Fields.Name: Decal Thin Out - Check Distance
Fields.Description: Candidates for thinning if there is a decal within this distance

Fields.Name: Decal Thin Out - Check Angle
Fields.Description: Candidates for thinning if the difference in decal direction is within this angle

Fields.Name: Decal Thin Out - Max Count
Fields.Description: If the distance and angle are more than this number, thin out

Fields.Name: Decal Thin Out - Check Count
Fields.Description: How many recent thinning candidates to check

Fields.Name: Decal Spawn Delay
Fields.Description: After trying to paste the decal, it will actually be pasted after this frame

Fields.Name: Random Variation - Diffuse
Fields.Description: Number of random variations of albedo texture (including 0th, 2 for 2 textures)

Fields.Name: Random Variation - Mask
Fields.Description: Number of random variations of mask texture (including 0th, 2 for 2 textures)

Fields.Name: Random Variation - Reflect
Fields.Description: Number of random variations of reflex textures (including 0th, 2 for 2 textures)

Fields.Name: Random Variation - Normal
Fields.Description: Number of random variations of normal texture (including 0th, 2 for 2 textures)

Fields.Name: Random Variation - Height
Fields.Description: Number of random variations of height texture (including 0th, 2 for 2 textures)

Fields.Name: Random Variation - Emissive
Fields.Description: Number of random variations of emissive textures (including 0th, 2 for 2 textures)

Fields.Name: Fade In Spawn Delay
Fields.Description: Fade-in time [seconds]

Fields.Name: Thin Out - Overlap Multiplier Radius
Fields.Description: Determine if the decal size is duplicated by multiplying it by this value.

Fields.Name: Thin Out - Neighbor Addition Radius
Fields.Description: Judge whether it is a neighborhood within the range of adding this distance [m] to the decal size.

Fields.Name: Thin Out - Overlap Limit Number
Fields.Description: Limit number that can be duplicated

Fields.Name: Thin Out - Neighbor Limit Number
Fields.Description: Maximum number of neighbors

Fields.Name: Thin Out Mode
Fields.Description: Thinning mode

Fields.Name: Emissive Color R
Fields.Description: Emissive color R

Fields.Name: Emissive Color G
Fields.Description: Emissive color G

Fields.Name: Emissive Color B
Fields.Description: Emissive color B

Fields.Name: Decal SFX Creation Max Angle
Fields.Description: SFX generation upper limit angle
